sentence: Even the Mogfather gets thrustrated waiting at his own door.

wombos.definition: The undisputed master of mogging — someone who dominates in appearance or presence so thoroughly that they command respect the way a Godfather commands loyalty.
wombos.example: Nobody steps into the room and owns it like he does — he's the Mogfather.

wombos.definition: Thoroughly and completely frustrated — a level of frustration so deep and total that it borders on a full sonchalashout.
wombos.example: After the third delay, I was absolutely thrustrated and needed a meat mountain immediately.
